So, you're in the market and somebody says, this is all great, but I'm going to contract for the next three months. I'm going to be honest, out of any objection you could possibly get, I've actually never been able to overcome the I'm under contract objection. When somebody literally tells you, I am obligated under legal terms for this company for up to three months, I want you to know I've made sales for people who are under contract by waiting whatever the term is for their contract to be up. The contract figure out when the term is for their contract to be up, let's say it's in three months, or my sales people actually go in and schedule reminders about a month out from their contract being done, two weeks out from their contract being done, and then we aggressively follow up in the last week of the contract being done, literally on the phone delivering value, and then we switch and swap the sale from them to us. Because they're under contract, those are actually the only people I ever do contract because I figured out that they would have left if they didn't. So just like a cheater in a real life relationship, you wouldn't be able to cheat or because they're likely to cheat again. If you're under contract or somebody who finds under contract and they want to leave the relationship and they would, if they weren't under that contract, make sure you put them under contract as well. Download your Megalodon contract that you can use in your business by swapping out the images and everything like that below. And one of the stories is if they're under contract, you got to accept it. You got to be able to either finesse some services that they're not getting in their current contract into your own agreement that you can execute by identifying side by side what they are getting versus what they're not getting, or wait it out, schedule it into your calendars, make some aggressive follow up when the time is getting close, and make the switch. See you in the next video.
